pages.text:
__Our trip to France 1991__
July 11th.                    mileage 1979
	We left at 12.45. Slight hold-up at Chad Circus, then clear run through to Dover via Dartford Tunnel. We drove straight onto the ferry just after 4.30. In France at 7.0.
	Eve ate fish & chips on the ferry & was sick in the night.
	We camped in Fontaines des Cleres campsite **** at Montreuil, a pretty walled town 40 minutes from Boulogne.
	John & Charles have enjoyed everything, & been no trouble.
	We left at 9.15. to go & visit Chartres. We did not reach Chartres. We stopped at Abbeville, to buy William sandals. Then we had lunch in a wood. In the afternoon we visited Rouen where we looked at the Church, lovely plain piers & varied clerestory. We rode in a "train" round the old wooden streets & collected a £[illegible] for
